# Dependencies

> External dependencies and their risk profiles.

## Dependency Index

| Name | Version | Purpose | Risk Level | License | Last Reviewed | Notes |
|------|---------|---------|------------|---------|---------------|-------|
<!-- Add dependencies as they are introduced. Example:
| express | 4.18.x | HTTP server framework | low | MIT | 2025-01-10 | Core dependency |
| jsonwebtoken | 9.0.x | JWT auth tokens | medium | MIT | 2025-01-10 | Security-critical |
| pg | 8.11.x | PostgreSQL client | low | MIT | 2025-01-10 | — |
-->

## Dependency Policy

- Justify every new dependency before adding it.
- Prefer well-maintained libraries with active communities.
- Pin versions in lock files.
- Review dependency updates for breaking changes before upgrading.
